title: WHOISleuth
description: Domain, IP and ASN lookup tool using the IANA RDAP bootstrap and live WHOIS, with bulk CSV scanning, typosquat detection and Certificate Transparency search. Built with Node.js and Express.

title: Forty Life
description: Touch-friendly life counter for Magic: The Gathering with a seating-aware rotating layout, live commander art via Scryfall, and full Commander-pod tracking for poison, commander damage, monarch and initiative. Built with Svelte and Tailwind CSS.

title: WearIt React
description: Clothing store website featuring a contact form and newsletter signup via Mailchimp. Built with React.

title: WearIt EJS
description: Clothing store website featuring a dark mode toggle with the ability to submit testimonials. Built with EJS and Express.

title: ReVue MongoDB
description: Website that allows authenticated users to submit, edit or remove reviews. Built with Vue, Express and MongoDB.

title: Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio website that allows me to showcase my web projects. Built with Astro and Tailwind CSS.
